mapper.sql: username, password, salt, email, type, status, activation_code, header_url, create_time
id, username, password, salt, email, type, status, activation_code, header_url, create_time, score, mute_until, ban_until
mapper.update: update user set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update user set header_url = #{headerUrl} where id = #{id}
update user set password = #{password} where id = #{id}
update user set type = #{type} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from user order by score desc, id asc limit #{limit}

select id, username, header_url, type from user where id in
#{id}
